name: hb_1_13
requirements: As part of your analysis, for Jingye Metallurgical Technology Co., Ltd. over 2025-06-10 to 2025-06-12 compute and store: peak_nox, total_nox, mean_nox (float), peak_nox_offset_hours (whole hours from 2025-06-10 00:00 to the NOx peak, int).

turns.query: Help me analyze when Jingye Metallurgical Technology Co., Ltd. has the highest NOx emissions during 2025-06-10 to 2025-06-12.
